sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52591" key="kali/ndhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλίνδ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52591.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κυλίνδησις</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a throw of the dice</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.42</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
